1845200.name: Pixacrea: Adventure
1845200.description:
Pixacrea is a retro-inspired adventure RPG with a fresh twist on the monster-taming genre. Unlike most creature-collecting games, losing has real consequences—if you’re defeated in battle, you lose your Battler's License. Without it, you can no longer participate as a Pixa Battler, forcing you into a mundane life with an ordinary job (Also known as the Game-Over Screen). This system keeps society running; after all, if everyone pursued battling, who would clean, cook, or make deliveries?

You'll explore a pixel-art world brimming with possibilities—crafting, farming, battling, and making choices that shape your journey. Your decisions matter, from something as small as no longer being able to receive a free fishing rod to something as massive as wiping an entire city off the map. Actions can have permanent consequences, closing off quests and shaping how the world perceives you, or even causing a Legendary Pixacrea to show up in the midst of it all.

At the heart of Pixacrea’s story lies Team Anarchy, a rogue faction trying to hack the Deck System—the very system that grants Battler’s Licenses. Their goal? To bend the rules, seize control, and reshape the world in their image. It's up to you and your adorable yet powerful Pixa companions to stop them before it's too late.

Lighthearted yet impactful, Pixacrea is packed with references and secrets for the sharp-eyed player. From subtle nods to classic games and anime to hidden mechanics waiting to be uncovered, there’s always something new to discover.

Are you ready to take on the Pixa League, face Team Anarchy, and carve out your own path in a world where every battle could be your last?

- Firema - Waterma - Earthma - Billy

Pixacrea – A Monster-Taming RPG Where Every Battle Counts

Welcome to Pixacrea, the ultimate retro-inspired monster-taming RPG where every choice matters, every battle has real stakes, and your journey is truly your own. Unlike traditional creature-collecting games, losing isn’t just a setback—it’s game over. If you lose a battle, you lose your Battler’s License, and without it, your dream of being a legendary Pixa Battler is over. No retries. No second chances. Just a normal life with a normal job… unless you fight to stay at the top.

- Slitha

Choices That Reacts to YOU

Every action you take in Pixacrea can change the world around you.

  • Help or hinder others, shaping the fate of NPCs. (Being rude to NPCs can have affects such as not receiving free items from them)

  • Make a devastating choice, from the destruction of a city, casualties, and so much more can be the affect of a simple choice.

- Skeptishell

Tame, Train, and Battle Adorable Yet Powerful Pixa

Build your dream team of Pixa, unique creatures that grow, evolve, and fight alongside you. Train them, strategize, and take on Team Anarchy in intense turn-based combat where one mistake could cost you everything.

- Sebacrab

 - Blueangel

Stop Team Anarchy Before They Break the System

A dangerous group, Team Anarchy, is working to hack the Deck System—the very system that grants Battlers their licenses. If they succeed, they’ll rewrite the rules and could seize control of the entire country. It’s up to you and your team of Pixa to stop them before it's too late.


The game is also very serious, and absolutely has ZERO references to anything else, nor does it have any Easter Eggs, whatsoever.

- Koz

- Gex

- Stror

An Adventure Like No Other – Immerse yourself in a retro-inspired monster-taming RPG where losing isn’t just a setback, it’s game over. Every decision matters, shaping the world, your story, and your fate.

Core Gameplay Features

  • High-Stakes Monster Taming – If you lose a battle, you lose your Battler’s License and can no longer fight.

  • Turn-Based Strategy Combat – Master deep, tactical battles with unique abilities, elemental strengths, and powerful Pixacreas.

  • Reactive Choices – Every choice you make can have real consequences, from simple decisions to game-changing events. You might miss side quests, shape NPC interactions, or So Much Worse, all based on your actions.

  • Stop Team Anarchy’s Plan – Battle against Team Anarchy, a rogue group trying to hack the Deck System and take control of the country.

Monster-Taming & Customization

  • 185 Unique Pixacrea – Discover, battle, and tame a vast collection of adorable yet powerful creatures to fight alongside you.

  • Customization & Skins – Unlock free, non-paid skins and outfits for both your character and Pixa.

  • Player-Owned House & Decorating – Own and customize your own home with furniture, decorations, and upgrades.

  • Crafting & Farming – Grow crops, gather resources, and craft essential gear to improve your adventure.

  • Fishing & Mini-Games – Enjoy relaxing fishing spots and fun mini-games scattered throughout the world.

  • NO MICROTRANSACTIONS - With a retro game, as well as our belief system, we believe if you pay for a product you should get access to the entire product without having to pay to unlock more. We have skins, and other unlockable content in the game, and they are all UNLOCKABLE in game only. Sorry to those who are CC warriors but we believe you should earn everything in a game.

Story & Exploration

  • A Gripping Questline – Follow an engaging main story from start to finish without excessive branching, keeping you immersed in the unfolding adventure.

  • Impactful Side Quests – Engage in optional quests that can change based on your past choices.

  • Retro-Style Graphics & Nostalgic Charm – Beautiful pixel art brings the world of Pixacrea to life with vibrant locations, lively towns, and hidden secrets.

  • Tons of Secrets & Easter Eggs – References to classic games, anime, and pop culture are waiting for those who pay attention.

  • Retro Inspired Storyline - Play a simple, and easy to follow along storyline that isn't going to take you hundreds of hours to beat. The game is kept simple by having a retro inspired storyline. You go throughout towns, battle, and try to stop an organization from taking over.

英语*
